## Variables

<a name="ShowCmd"></a>ShowCmd is the cobra entrypoint for browsing built\-in devcontainer presets.

```go
var ShowCmd = &cobra.Command{
    Use:   "show-examples",
    Short: "Browse built-in devcontainer presets in YAML",
    Run:   runShow,
}
```
